name: OnTlsClose
title: OnTlsClose
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called when the peer closes the tls connection while a receive call is pending.

parameters.name: socket
parameters.description: The TLS socket handle. If the handle is valid (not equal to ~0), it corresponds to the socket that was used for tlsOpen.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The specific TLS result code. If the peer has closed the connection, the result is 4 (PeerClosed).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
